title: super simple quick way to make ferrofluid
description: This is such a simple method for synthesising ferrofluid it is almost a joke. What you do is take 3.5g of iron sulphate and dissolve it in 200mL of water then pour in 2Molar sodium hydroxide until the pH is around 11. Then microwave it in an ordinary microwave at about 250W for around 4 mins and - hey presto - you will have magnetite. add that to oil and - ferrofluid. In all this took me 10 minutes to do - fantastic!
